name: Shipping and handling fees
summary: Shipping, handling, and delivery fees added at cart or checkout.

evidence.claim: Shipping charges are explicitly excluded from the FTC Junk Fees Rule's Total Price requirement; they may be disclosed separately.

body.description: Fees for delivery of a physical product. Can be genuine cost pass-through, padded markup, or a dark-pattern lever used to raise the total after the user has committed to the purchase.

disclosureLegality.requirement: Shipping not required in FTC Junk Fees Total Price (E1); may be disclosed separately.
Must be disclosed before checkout under Consumer Rights Directive; hidden shipping is a UCPD unfair practice.

negotiability.script: I'd like to know if you can waive the shipping fee on this order. Many of your competitors offer free shipping on orders over [X]. If not, I'll need to reconsider the purchase.
